item_specifications.special_feature: Airline Approved, Durable, Easy to Clean, Easy to Use, Weather-proof

about_item: 🐶High-fashion designer pet carrier purse: Minsong's dog carrier doubles as a pet handbag for fashion-conscious pet owners. Making you and your furry friend the envy of all other pet owners. And a fixed leash inside keep pet from running out.

🐱Perfect soft-sided carriers for small dogs or puppies: Pet carrier size:(LxWxH): 16.3”x7.9”x10.8”. Our dog carrier is designed to comfortably transport small dogs and puppies up to 10 lbs. Front Large pocket can storing treats, toys, and more. Fits most small sized pets, dogs, cats, puppies girl or boy, newborn kitten, bunny rabbit, chinchilla guinea pig, chihuahua, yorkie, dachshund, teacup dog.
🧡All-In-One Travel Pet Carrier: Minsong's dog travel bag have luggage attachment and TSA Airline Approved, allowing you to easily take your furry friend on trips with you.
💙High-quality leather: Crafted from sturdy, high-quality vegan leather, our dog purse is built to withstand everyday wear and tear. Such shopping, walking, travel, outdoor activities etc.
✈️Easy to carry: With its removable, adjustable crossbody strap and easy-to-grab handles, Minsong's pet carrier is easy and comfortable to carry wherever you go.

🎁[100% Satisfied Service] We hope that you will be satisfied with pet carrier, but if for some you are not satisfied with your purchase, or you have any problem with the order, please kindly let us know, we are glad to do you a favor for your question, reply will be done within 24 hours and free exchange for wrong item shipped or item damaged.

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier to be a great quality bag with a classy look, and appreciate its handy front pocket and comfort. The size receives mixed feedback - while some find it perfect, others say it's too big. Durability is also mixed, with customers describing it as sturdy, though one reports issues with the top cracking after 3-4 months of use.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect bag
authors_reviews.text: Best bag I've ever tried out of many many.6lb Maltipoo very comfortable, Zipper keeps her safe in.It's very comfortable to carry 4.The healer looks really great.No one knows I have a dog at all.Heysuper soft.Dont hesitate
authors_reviews.author: Wendy

authors_reviews.title: Classy Look
authors_reviews.text: Great quality. Perfect fit for my 2 pound Maltese. The big pocket is especially useful and can carry a lot of extra stuff.
authors_reviews.author: Pamela Miller

authors_reviews.title: Love it!
authors_reviews.text: This carrier is excellent for my yorkie pup. I love how inconspicuous it is. People hardly ever notice I’m carrying a dog around unless she starts yapping. I love that it has mesh all around for airflow.
authors_reviews.author: Zh

authors_reviews.title: It would be absolutely PERFECT BUT…
authors_reviews.text: I absolutely love this pet carrier purse *but* there is one major downside...SO, here are the PROS: It has all the features needed; a hook/clip/strap on the inside to attach to your pet’s harness/collar, top and side vents, a zippered top, that you can roll back and clip back, if you’d like your pet’s head to stick out the top, and you can also zipper it shut and attach it at the end with velcro if you prefer your pet to remain inside. Even has a side flap pocket for extra necessities - BUT - the only downside is the manufacturing/construction of where the “straps” attached to the bag…SO, here is the ONLY CON: The strap of the bag are poorly sewn to the bag and you can see areas of the pleather straps unevenly cut where they’re sewn onto the bag - only after using it twice (and buying it 7-8 days prior) I can already see loose threads where the straps connect to the bag… I’ve attached pics so see pics for proof…This critique is for the SELLER: *PLEASE* upgrade the construction/sewing of the straps on the bag; particularly where the straps are cut and sewn onto the bag - this needs to be a lot more professionally cut/sewn the way the straps are currently constructed, it makes the bag look cheap and poorly manufactured — aside from this one detail, the bag is perfect!
authors_reviews.author: Diana R. Pina ᥫ᭡

authors_reviews.title: It's really nice for the price.
authors_reviews.text: It's a little bigger than I thought but I think my dog is enjoying the extra room she has in the her new bag.She's eight pounds. The bag looks more expensive than it is. It looks like real leather, I like the big side pocket for my keys and phone, grocery bag and dog water bowl. It's a more sophisticated looking bag.
authors_reviews.author: Melanie B.

authors_reviews.title: Great Quality Carrier
authors_reviews.text: I was initially looking for a carrier that didn't "Iook" like a typical carrier. I must say that I am very pleased with this one. It is very well made and a perfect fit for our 8lb mini schnauzer. You can't really beat the price either. It looks more like a purse rather than a carrier and is comfortable enough for my fur baby to enjoy a day out with the family. The front pocket is large enough to fit her food/snacks and collapsible water container in addition to most of the stuff that I would normally put in my crossbody purse (i.e. wallet/cell phone). If you are looking for something that is fashionable, and well made for a good price, this will not disappoint.
authors_reviews.author: Jovie Sanchez

authors_reviews.title: Great designer like appearance and wonderful quality
authors_reviews.text: I love this pet carrier and my 6lb Maltese fits perfectly. It's got a breathable mesh on the side and I love the big pocket on back.. the pocket holds my phone and wallet when I'm in a hurry and just need a few things instead of carrying my purse too. It looks like a designer bag and I get lots of compliments.. I also get a lot of people who get startled when they realize my pup is in there lol
authors_reviews.author: Bobbie suggs

authors_reviews.title: Pocket is useful
authors_reviews.text: Great quality. Washes up well. I will buy again.
authors_reviews.author: Melissa C. Azevedo

other_countries_reviews.title: Best pup bag!!
other_countries_reviews.text: I have a few bags but wanted one with closer, like a kennel but purse style… this is absolutely perfect! I take my pups everywhere now! No one even knows there with me! I can fit all 3 of my tiny chi pups- 2.5, 3, 4.5lbs, and they all fit comfortably! Best investment ever! Very happy with my purchase
other_countries_reviews.author: Jenna Ormel

other_countries_reviews.title: excellente
other_countries_reviews.text: Exactly like advertised. I take my dog everywhere and its perfect!
other_countries_reviews.author: Lydia H.
